title: Digital Marketing Projects
text:
This page showcases selected projects from my professional and academic experience in campaign strategy, content creation, and lifecycle marketing.



📅 March 2026 – Present | Pasadena, CA
As Digital Marketing Assistant, I create and manage content across social media, email campaigns, and video — supporting the RBAC’s mission of water safety, community engagement, and program awareness.


I designed and distributed monthly employee newsletters using Feathr, covering staff spotlights, upcoming events, new hires, and internal announcements.



Highlighted Gratitude Grams, welcomed new team members, announced CPR/AED certification opportunities, and introduced my own role as Digital Marketing Assistant.

✨ View March Newsletter




Promoted the Dodgers Night employee event with RSVP link, introduced new team members, highlighted the Pasadena Triathlon and UCLA Spring Game, and teased the upcoming Mother’s Day Scavenger Hunt.

✨ View April Newsletter







Featured in an RBAC community-wide email blast, this video stars me as Assistant Lifeguard Manager, walking the RBAC community through the daily pool preparation checklist — showing how water safety is built into everything before a swimmer ever steps on deck.


Sent to the full RBAC community as part of Water Safety Month (May 2026), promoting the Treading for Water Safety Challenge fundraiser.

 







📧 View the Community Email Blast





I create regular posts for @theRBAC covering program promotions, water safety awareness, community events, and staff highlights.















🗓 April 2023 | Co-presented with Isabella Garcia
In 2023, before Spotify launched its AI DJ feature, my group partner and I recommended that Spotify implement AI-driven personalization tools to deepen engagement and differentiate from competitors. Shortly after, Spotify began rolling out exactly that.

🎯 Focus: AI integration strategy, music personalization, competitive positioning
📈 Outcome: Proposed AI-driven recommendations — features Spotify later launched

title: From Clicks to Conversions
text:
Business Problem & Project Overview



MEin3D — small startup specializing in custom 3D-printed figurines for life’s milestones.
MEin3D lacked automated, personalized, data-driven communication — limiting trust, engagement, and long-term customer value.





AO
Question
Method




AO1
Non-personalized baseline?
Funnel analysis


AO2
Does AI affect trust?
One-way ANOVA


AO3
Social behavior → engagement?
A/B test


AO4
Which CTA drives lift?
Z-test


AO5
Where do users drop off?
GA4 funnel

title: From Clicks to Conversions
text:
AO1 — Non-Personalized Baseline
Jessica Garcia















Metric
Value




Deliverability
96.1%


Open Rate
27.3%


Click-to-Open Rate
10.0%


Unsubscribes
0




Key finding: 90% drop-off between open and click. The content and CTA are the bottleneck — not the subject line. This directly motivates AO4.

title: From Clicks to Conversions
text:
AO2 — AI Personalization & Trust
Krystal Lee















Statistic
Value




Mean Trust (AI)
4.24


Mean Trust (Control)
4.16


F-Statistic
0.745


p-Value
0.39


95% CI (Tukey)
[−0.280, 0.110]




AI personalization does not erode trust — green light to scale personalized campaigns.

title: From Clicks to Conversions
text:
AO3 — Social Behavior & Engagement
Nerina Campos
Meta signals (likes, shares, saves, comments) used to classify subscribers → personalized vs. generic





Email Type
Subject Line
Sent
Opened
Clicked
Open Rate
Click Rate




Personalized
Your Car Could Be Next 🚗 |
73|
19|
4|
6% |
*5%** |


Generic
Something New Is Coming This April 🚗 |
74|
16|
0|
2% |
*0%** |






Personalization drives action — 5% click rate vs. 0% for generic. Behavior-based messaging creates stronger connection and higher conversion potential.

title: From Clicks to Conversions
text:
AO4 — CTA Feature Optimization
Serena Shi




Open Rate +6.7pp
23.1% → 29.9%



CTR +2.6×
1.38% → 3.56%



CTOR +2×
5.6% → 11.4%
Z = −1.90, p = 0.058

title: From Clicks to Conversions
text:
AO5 — Website Funnel Analysis
Kathleen Juarez















Channel
Sessions
Conv. Rate




Unassigned
32
3.1%


Organic Search
86
2.3%


Organic Social
207
0.5%


Direct
213
0.5%


TOTAL
563
0.9%




99.1% of visitors leave without booking. Sharpest drop at Form Start. Organic Search converts 4× better than Social.

title: From Clicks to Conversions
text:
Recommendations & Summary


Immediate (0–30 days)

Deploy AI-personalized CTAs — 2.6× CTR, trust preserved


Fix the booking form — 92% drop-off at Form Start

Medium-Term (30–90 days)

Invest in Organic Search — highest converting channel


Scale A/B testing to n ≈ 600+ to confirm AO4

Long-Term (90+ days)

Build automated email nurture sequences


Implement GA4 purchase event tracking





AO
Key Finding




AO1
10% CTOR baseline — content is bottleneck


AO2
AI preserves trust (p = 0.39)


AO3
5% click vs. 0% generic


AO4
2× CTOR, 2.6× CTR lift


AO5
99.1% don’t book — fix funnel




The trust is there. The lift is real. Fix the funnel.

title: From Clicks to Conversions
text:
Thank You

Group 2 — IBM 6530
Nerina Campos · Jessica Garcia · Kathleen Juarez · Krystal Lee · Serena Shi (Project Lead)
Faculty Lead: Dr. Elif Ozkaya
GitHub: github.com/soserena/mein3d_project

title: Resume
text:
✨ Download Resume


Rose Bowl Stadium Guest Service Representative | Pasadena, CA | April 2025 – Present

Provide guest services, resolve issues, and support VIP access during major events.
Assist Ticketmaster entry operations including scanning, credentials, and wrist banding
Support event managers to maintain smooth operations for high‑volume crowds Major Events: FIFA World Cup (50,000+), Rose Bowl Game (90,000+)

Havas Street Brand Ambassador | Los Angeles, CA | November 2025

Supported event activation, guest engagement, and brand representation at high‑traffic events for Farmer John Mobile Tour and RunDisney X Brooks

Rose Bowl Aquatics Center Digital Marketing Assistant | Pasadena, CA | March 2026 - Present

Create and manage digital content for social media, email campaigns, and website updates
Analyze campaign performance and audience engagement to optimize marketing strategies

Human Resources Assistant | Pasadena, CA | April 2024 - Present

Lead talent acquisition and onboarding for 100+ employees, ensuring accurate documentation and smooth processes
Manage confidential employee records, HR inboxes, and internal communications
Support payroll and timekeeping through Paychex Flex
Coordinate scheduling, invoices, and administrative workflows for director

Assistant Lifeguard Manager | Pasadena, CA | December 2024 - Present

Supervise 50+ staff and manage daily schedules, adjusting coverage in real time
Lead interviews, orientations, and training for new hires.
Support operations including inventory, customer service, and staff meetings.





MS Digital Marketing – Cal Poly Pomona
BA Business Administration (Marketing) – Whittier College





Human Resources & Talent Support: HR practices; talent acquisition, recruiting, and retention; employee onboarding, offboarding, and documentation; personnel communication and correspondence
Operations & Administration: Project and time management; purchasing, inventory, and budget coordination; event operations support; team supervision and leadership; community relations and engagement
Customer & Guest Experience: Customer service, guest relations, and front‑line event support including Ticketmaster entry operations
Technical Skills: MS Office, Google Workspace and Analytics, Slack, Canva, Qualtrics, HubSpot, Tableau, R Studio
Bilingual: English (Fluent), Spanish (Conversational)
